flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 39% at University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.0k vs 4.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $6.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $6.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon vs the 2018–2022 baseline (31.4% vs 37.4%).
